headline: Outset Medical Names Derick Elliott as Executive Vice President of Commercial
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., April 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Outset Medical, Inc. (Nasdaq: OM), a medical technology company pioneering a first-of-its-kind technology to improve clinical outcomes in dialysis with less cost and complexity, today announced the appointment of Derick Elliott as Executive Vice President of Commercial, effective immediately. Mr. Elliott is responsible for Outset’s commercial organizations supporting acute, post-acute and home healthcare providers, reporting to Chair and CEO L

headline: BD Rolls Out Next-Gen Medication Dispensing System Across Europe
summary: BDX rolls out AI-powered Pyxis Pro and Incada platforms in Europe, aiming to boost hospital efficiency, improve medication access and elevate patient care.

headline: Is Medline Inc. (MDLN) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is MDLN a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Medline Inc. on The Pursuit of Compounding’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on MDLN. Medline Inc.’s share was trading at $41.36 as of March 27th. MDLN’s trailing and forward P/E were 29.91 and 29.24 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Medline Industries (MDLN) […]
